overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat exploring a foggy Victorian cemetery at night. The character walks through Stonebridge Cemetery, passing gothic mausoleums, tombstones, and iron gates while encountering hostile figures in the mist.

events.description: character walks through the Stonebridge Cemetery iron gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy tree-lined path toward the cemetery entrance

entered.detail: weathered wooden park bench beside the path
ornate iron archway with 'STONEBRIDGE CEMETERY' lettering
black wrought iron fence lining the cemetery perimeter
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
leafless deciduous trees with twisted branches
tall stone crucifix monument visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy autumn night with the camera following a character along a dirt path lined with bare trees. A wooden bench sits to the left as the character approaches the imposing iron gates of Stonebridge Cemetery, passing through them as the scene transitions into the burial grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cemetery grounds with central monument

events.description: hostile figures appear standing near the cross monument in the fog

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large central cross monument while approaching hostile figures

notable_agents.action: hostile figure standing guard near the stone cross

entered.detail: weathered grave markers of varying sizes dotting the grounds
gothic stone burial chamber with pointed roof

segments.scene_description: Inside the cemetery grounds, the character moves through the fog toward a prominent stone cross monument. Tombstones and small mausoleums populate the landscape. As the character approaches, shadowy hostile figures become visible standing near the cross, creating tension in the misty atmosphere.

events.description: character enters the gothic archway of a stone mausoleum

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the stone archway entrance of a mausoleum

entered.detail: pointed stone archway entrance with carved details
flanking columns supporting the mausoleum entrance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the open cemetery grounds and approaches a gothic mausoleum entrance. Passing between stone pillars, the character enters the archway, transitioning from the exposed foggy grounds to a slightly sheltered passage with cobblestone flooring.

agents.ego_description: walking through a confined passage between high stone walls and iron fences

entered.detail: tall stone walls of family burial chambers

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, winding path between closely packed mausoleums. The high stone walls and iron fences create a claustrophobic corridor with limited visibility, lit only by distant lamps. The cobblestone path descends slightly as the character moves deeper into the cemetery.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cemetery path with family mausoleums

events.description: approaching secondary iron gate leading to inner cemetery section

agents.ego_description: walking along a curving path lined with stone mausoleums and bare trees

entered.detail: ornate iron gate with stone pillars marking inner boundary

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the character follows a winding cobblestone path through a section with larger family mausoleums. The path curves through scattered trees toward a secondary iron gate that leads to a more disturbed section of the cemetery.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined cemetery section with broken tombs

events.description: passing through gate into disturbed burial ground with visible damage
character begins ascending stone stairs toward elevated area

agents.ego_description: walking through the ruined section and climbing stone stairs

notable_agents.action: hostile figure moving through fog near broken tombstones

entered.detail: damaged stone archway with broken ironwork
toppled and shattered grave markers scattered on ground
weathered stone steps leading to elevated cemetery section

segments.scene_description: Passing through the ruined gate, the character enters a disturbed section of the cemetery where tombstones lie broken and scattered. Hostile figures move through the fog ahead. The character approaches and begins ascending a set of stone stairs leading to a higher elevation with more ruined structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet autumn road into the increasingly claustrophobic and ruined depths of a gothic cemetery. It begins along a dirt path lined with bare trees, moving past a wooden bench and through imposing iron gates to enter the misty burial grounds. As the camera follows the character toward a stone cross monument, shadowy hostile figures emerge from the fog before the scene shifts into the sheltered archway of a gothic mausoleum. The environment then tightens into a narrow, winding cobblestone corridor flanked by high stone walls and iron fences, eventually opening up into a section of larger family tombs. Finally, the path leads through a ruined secondary gate into a disturbed landscape of broken tombstones and lurking figures, ending as the camera ascends a set of stone stairs toward higher, ruined structures.
